name: Kana (Edolas)
description: Kana (Edolas) is a member of the Edolas Fairy Tail Guild. She is the Edolas counterpart of Kana Alberona. Unlike her Earth Land counterpart who wears a bikini type top, Kana is seen wearing proper and non-revealing attire. She even sits properly with her hands on her laps as opposed to her Earth Land counterpart who sits cross-legged while drinking. She is also polite and declines to drink alcohol with Edolas Macao, as she 'dislikes it'. She also hates to fight, saying that she would rather have tea parties instead. Kana (Edolas) uses a pink wand the length of a baton with a rounded top that has a golden star at its middle.
